instruction: Reset the position of the red notification badge on the alert octagon icon. (very subtle — only 3px off).
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/alert-octagon.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><polygon points="7.86 2 16.14 2 22 7.86 22 16.14 16.14 22 7.86 22 2 16.14 2 7.86 7.86 2"/><line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12" y2="12"/><line x1="12" y1="16" x2="12.01" y2="16"/></g>
  <circle id="badge" fill="#e63946" cx="107" cy="24" r="6" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/alert-octagon.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><polygon points="7.86 2 16.14 2 22 7.86 22 16.14 16.14 22 7.86 22 2 16.14 2 7.86 7.86 2"/><line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12" y2="12"/><line x1="12" y1="16" x2="12.01" y2="16"/></g>
  <circle id="badge" fill="#e63946" cx="104" cy="24" r="6" />
</svg>
